title: tagetes verticillata
intro: Tagetes verticillata, also known as Mexican marigold or golden marigold, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect wounds. The health benefits of Tagetes verticillata include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to reap its benefits.
